connect.title: Migrate your account
connect.disclaimer: Cartridge Controller will no longer be supported in future versions of Jokers of Neon. This migration will move all your progress and NFT cards from your Cartridge Controller to your new or existing Jokers of Neon account. It is irreversible, so make sure both accounts are correct before continuing.

jokers.title: Connect or create your Jokers of Neon account
jokers.unavailable: Jokers account login is not available right now.

confirmation.title: Confirm migration
confirmation.description: You are about to permanently migrate all your progress and NFT cards from your Cartridge Controller to your Jokers of Neon account. This action is irreversible.

retry.title: Retry migration
retry.description: Only the failed migration operations will be retried.

cleanup.title: Remove worker access
cleanup.description: Your cards and progress have been migrated. Confirm one final transaction to remove access from all migration workers.

migration.in-progress-description: This migration can take several minutes. Please do not close this tab.
migration.counting-cards-description: We're preparing your migration. This may take a few seconds.
migration.phase-transfers: Your cards are being transferred securely by the migration workers. You can close this page and return later.
migration.phase-roguelike: Your roguelike progress is being migrated.
migration.phase-cleanup: Migration processing is complete. Remove worker access to finish securely.
migration.success: You can now log in to Jokers of Neon with your new account.
migration.error: We couldn't complete the migration. Please try again.
